mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME,P.PRODUCT_DETAILS, P.ORIGINAL_PRICE, P.IMG_URL, P.PRO_TYPE FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO WHERE C.USER_ID = #{userid} AND PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME,P.PRODUCT_DETAILS, P.ORIGINAL_PRICE, P.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO WHERE C.USER_ID = #{userid};
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET PRODUCT_NAME = #{productName}, PRODUCT_DETAILS = #{productDetails}, ORIGINAL_PRICE = #{originalPrice}, IMG_URL = #{imgUrl}, PRO_TYPE = #{proType} WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
